overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City's neon-drenched downtown at night. The clip follows the character along elevated walkways and street-level sidewalks surrounded by towering skyscrapers covered in holographic advertisements, with wet streets reflecting the vibrant cyan and magenta neon lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway between corporate towers

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the elevated walkway, passing other pedestrians while surrounded by towering skyscrapers with holographic advertisements

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead of ego on the same path

entered.detail: tall vertical holographic advertisement featuring a male figure in sunglasses on the left building facade
multi-story building with illuminated windows and teal neon accents
raised concrete sidewalk with metal railings overlooking the street below
multiple glowing digital billboards and brand advertisements on the right building face
elevated highway or monorail track crossing above the walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on an elevated pedestrian walkway sandwiched between towering corporate skyscrapers in a futuristic city. The Johnny Silverhand billboard dominates the left side while neon holographic advertisements glow on the right. The walkway is sheltered under an overhead bridge structure, with sparse pedestrian traffic moving in scattered directions.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with pedestrian crosswalks and digital signage

events.description: exits the enclosed elevated walkway into a more open intersection area with visible crosswalks and traffic signals

agents.ego_description: walking across the intersection crosswalk, navigating through moderate pedestrian traffic while approaching the street level

notable_agents.action: futuristic car driving through the intersection in the background

entered.detail: zebra-striped pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt with yellow tactile paving
vertical traffic signal showing red light for vehicles
illuminated corporate signage with purple and white branding on the left building

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up into a wide urban intersection as the character leaves the enclosed walkway behind. The crosswalk features yellow tactile paving and zebra stripes, with a traffic light visible ahead. Moderate pedestrian traffic crosses in various directions while a futuristic vehicle drives through the intersection in the background. The Kiroshi Opticals sign becomes visible on the left as the previous buildings recede into the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: street-level sidewalk with heavy advertising and vehicle traffic

events.description: character turns right at the intersection corner and continues along the street-level sidewalk

agents.ego_description: turning right at the intersection corner and proceeding along the sidewalk, passing other pedestrians and observing the street traffic

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with distinctive outfit walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive vertical digital advertisement featuring a muscular figure in a leather jacket with red '35V' text
ground-level concrete pavement with metal railings separating pedestrian and vehicle areas
digital street sign displaying speed limit of 40 mounted on a pole
black metal railing running along the edge of the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character turns right onto a street-level sidewalk, leaving the intersection behind. A massive 35V billboard dominates the left side of the view, advertising a muscular figure in futuristic attire. The sidewalk runs parallel to a street with moderate vehicle traffic, separated by metal railings. A speed limit sign displaying '40' is visible on the right as the character walks past storefronts with glowing neon signs.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved sidewalk under elevated highway with neon lighting

agents.ego_description: continuing along the curved sidewalk under the overpass, approaching the next street corner with minimal pedestrian interaction

entered.detail: elevated concrete highway or monorail track casting shadows over the sidewalk
winding concrete path with wet reflective surface curving to the left
vertical light fixtures emitting purple glow along the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows the character along a curved sidewalk that bends left under an elevated overpass structure. The area is sheltered from above with the sky mostly blocked by the highway. Purple neon light poles line the left side of the path, casting colored reflections on the wet pavement. The large 35V billboard and speed limit sign from the previous segment fall behind as the character approaches the next corner with storefronts visible ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered, narrow pedestrian corridor into a wide, open urban intersection. It begins on an elevated walkway sandwiched between towering corporate skyscrapers, where a dominant Johnny Silverhand billboard and glowing holographic advertisements frame the path under an overhead bridge. As the character moves forward, the enclosed architecture recedes, and the scene opens up into a sprawling city crossing. The camera then glides across a zebra-striped crosswalk with yellow tactile paving, passing moderate pedestrian traffic and a futuristic vehicle. Finally, the perspective expands to reveal a Kiroshi Opticals sign on the left as the previous skyscrapers fade into the distance of the vibrant downtown landscape.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a neon-lit city sidewalk that transitions from an open street-level view into a sheltered urban underpass. It begins as the character turns right onto a sidewalk, passing a massive 35V billboard of a muscular figure and a speed limit sign while walking parallel to a street of moderate traffic. As the character moves past glowing storefronts, the open sky begins to vanish, and the path curves leftward. The scene then shifts beneath a heavy elevated overpass structure, where the environment becomes enclosed and the lighting is dominated by purple neon poles casting vibrant reflections on the wet pavement. Finally, the initial billboards and signs recede into the distance as the camera follows the character toward a new corner of storefronts.
